Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, and bilirubinuria, with low urine specific gravity and brown, cloudy urine. HbA1c is unexpectedly low despite glucosuria. These findings suggest impaired renal function (possible acute or chronic kidney disease) and abnormal urinary findings, possibly due to tubular dysfunction or acute illness. Further clinical correlation and nephrology evaluation are recommended.
